DownloadAllDesc: Export every question currently in the database as a CSV file.
UploadDesc: Upload a CSV file to import questions. Rows where MainText or QuestionText already exists in the database will be skipped.
DownloadTemplateDesc: Download a CSV template with two example questions showing the correct column format for upload.
RemoveAllDesc: Permanently delete every question from the database. A full CSV backup will be downloaded automatically before deletion.
RemoveAllWarning1: This will permanently delete all questions from the database.
RemoveAllWarning2: A CSV backup of all questions will be downloaded to your computer before deletion.
YesDeleteAll: Yes, delete all and download backup
